calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2016 Single Assignment

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Similar Action Filed In The United States District Court For The Southern District Of California
Off Calendar Aug-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT THE GYMBOREE CORPORATION'S Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Similar Action Filed In The United States District Court For The Southern District Of California is DENIED as moot. The federal case alleged to be substantially similar to this one - Dennis v. Gymboree Corp. - was dismissed. Thus, this motion's basis no longer exists. If the Dennis case is refiled, the motion to stay may be refiled. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Similar Action Filed In The United States District Court For The Southern District Of California
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Continued To Aug-03-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
